entity.summary: Israeli centralized cryptocurrency exchange operating since 2013 that announced a planned corporate transition involving the eToro group in May 2026 while continuing normal service.
entity.notes: Bit2C's official company page states that its trading platform has operated since 2013. On May 7, 2026, Bit2C announced a planned corporate transition involving Bit2C eToro Ltd, subject to closing conditions, while activity and fees remained unchanged.

events.title: Bit2C trading platform began operating
events.description: Bit2C began operating its Israeli cryptocurrency trading platform in 2013.
events.notes: The official company history establishes the year but not the exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

events.title: Bit2C announced an eToro group transition
events.description: Bit2C announced a planned corporate transition involving Bit2C eToro Ltd and the eToro group.
events.notes: Normal service was expected to continue and completion remained subject to closing conditions.

evidence.title: Bit2C official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bit2C identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bit2C
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Bit2C exchange identity.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Bit2C
evidence.notes: Independent directory reference corroborates Bit2C naming and exchange identity.

evidence.title: About Bit2C
evidence.notes: Official company page states that the Bit2C trading platform has operated since 2013.

evidence.title: Litecoin trading opened on Bit2C
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous official post confirms the exchange was actively operating during 2013.

evidence.title: Bit2C joins the eToro group
evidence.notes: Official announcement records the planned transition and continued normal service during the process.
